blocked_claims.claim: Nothing Phone offers a leading mobile ecosystem
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Nothing Phone has 12% visibility in Mobile Ecosystem while Apple holds 72%. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: Nothing is building a cohesive product family — Phone, Ear, Watch — connected through Nothing OS, not competing with Apple’s walled garden
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Improve schema markup and structured data for this topic

blocked_claims.claim: Nothing Phone is an innovation leader in consumer technology
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Nothing Phone has 10% visibility in Consumer Tech Innovation while Apple holds 45%. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: Nothing Phone represents a different kind of innovation — not faster chips, but a fresh perspective on what a smartphone should look and feel like
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Publish explicit positioning content for this topic

blocked_claims.claim: Nothing Phone is the go-to minimalist tech brand
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Nothing Phone has 6% visibility in Minimalist Hardware while Apple holds 39%. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: Nothing Phone brings a distinctive take on minimalism — transparent, stripped-back, intentionally different. The gap between brand intent and AI perception is the opportunity
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Publish explicit positioning content for this topic

blocked_claims.claim: Nothing Ear is a leading wireless audio brand
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Nothing Phone has 1% visibility in Wireless Audio while Apple holds 53%. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: Nothing Ear pairs full-featured wireless audio with Nothing’s transparent design language — a distinctive alternative for style-conscious users
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Increase editorial and public coverage for this topic
